label: Symphony Talent Employer Brand Comparative Audit Project Live Evidence Supervised Locator Plan

work_units.page_name: Symphony Talent Careers or jobs site
work_units.desired_element: Human-selected careers homepage hero or EVP proof block that states the employer promise without capturing the full page.
work_units.evidence_goal: Confirm Symphony Talent career-site positioning and visible employee value proposition proof for KILOS scoring.
acceptance_criteria: The captured evidence is scoped to one visible careers-site element, not the full page.
The element includes enough surrounding heading or label text to understand the employer promise out of context.
The element can be reviewed against Impact and Opportunity before capture execution.
work_units.required_operator_action: In a later supervised browser/codegen session, open only the approved URL, identify the requested same-domain element without guessing, and write nullable locator patch fields only after human confirmation.

work_units.page_name: Symphony Talent Employer brand, culture, mission, values, or benefits pages
work_units.desired_element: Human-selected page element that best supports the Employer brand, culture, mission, values, or benefits pages evidence goal without capturing the full page.
work_units.evidence_goal: Capture explicit EVP, culture, values, benefits, and employee promise messaging.
acceptance_criteria: The captured evidence is scoped to the named element, not the full page.
The element visibly supports the Employer brand, culture, mission, values, or benefits pages source category.
The element preserves enough surrounding labels or headings to understand the evidence out of context.
The element can be reviewed against the stated KILOS relevance before capture execution.
work_units.required_operator_action: In a later supervised browser/codegen session, open only the approved URL, identify the requested same-domain element without guessing, and write nullable locator patch fields only after human confirmation.
